data.general: With the Sun in the 8th house and Mercury also there, you may feel a sense of intensity and focus in your work and finances, Tula. However, Mars in the 7th house can indicate a tendency to be overly critical in your relationships. Your focus on stability and security may lead you to prioritize your career over your personal life for now.
data.luck: Your luck is tied to the positions of Rahu and Ketu. With Rahu in the 5th house and Ketu in the 11th, you may experience a mix of creative and intellectual pursuits, but also some tension between your emotional and mental well-being. Be cautious of taking risks in your personal life.
data.scope: The presence of Jupiter and Venus in the 9th house can indicate a desire for expansion and exploration in your spiritual and philosophical pursuits. This may be a good time to learn new skills or take on new challenges, but make sure to balance your ambitions with your emotional needs.
data.study: Mars in the 7th house can indicate a need for assertiveness and self-confidence in your academic or professional pursuits. The Sun and Mercury in the 8th house can also suggest a focus on detail and analysis, which can be beneficial for research and problem-solving.
data.love: With Venus in the 9th house, you may be drawn to someone who is adventurous and open-minded, Tula. However, the presence of Saturn in the 6th house can indicate a tendency to be overly critical or perfectionistic in your relationships. Try to find a balance between your high standards and your emotional needs.
data.travel: The 9th house is associated with long-distance travel and higher education. With Jupiter and Venus in this house, you may have opportunities to explore new places and cultures, but be mindful of the potential for restlessness or wanderlust.
